author: Elizabeth Modgill
content: Joanne and team were fantastic from start to finish when providing inflatables for our school fair.  They are are a very professional, friendly company who really listen to what customers want and make very helpful suggestions based on this.  The range of inflatables they have is brilliant, and they were really enjoyed by the children - lots of positive comments were received.  The quote was fair, organisation excellent, and I would not hesitate to recommend Monster Event Hire to others.
